---
layout: default
title: "Parliament Deadlock Over Paper Leaks and Legislative Agenda"
date: 2026-07-24T06:07:11.524444+00:00
summary: "Parliament faces a fourth day of disruption as the opposition demands the Education Minister's resignation over paper leaks while the government plans new laws"
run_time_ist: "11:37AM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 11:37AM</p>


<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li>Parliament has faced a fourth consecutive day of disruptions as the INDIA bloc staged protests at the Makar Dwar demanding the resignation of Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan over the NEET paper leak row.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiVEFVX3lxTFBNSy12YktGbl84VDk2eC1PTVN2RWpRQjduTnZqSkVMc0tXcGZIeXRIbmF1NHU1WjV1RE5yM2gyVlJfejZFWUdOTEx4dGpGZHljTVZjTA?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I8</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I9</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuAFBVV95cUxOVWRjcGNoOVdiUXhVdjQtZHVFa29PZ0NZUHF5NkthRWdlZWtNRi1qY1M3dFhMZkxNem1Za0Fvbk9rWHBPS25KZkR3Tk42VzBkMjBKTzFyY0MzRWtmX3dnQXIwcnBfQjFJVWFzNThWNF9CU2JCREVKOVFJYk5ubEdCWmRiaXFud05vSWctUmZMM2hnM3J3al85czhqNWVCenhjbDlFSTRMSHczZGJnUVQwM1pBdllUMjha?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I10</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I11</a></span></li>
  <li>The Lok Sabha is scheduled to take up the Supreme Court Judges Amendment Bill for discussion amidst the ongoing political standoff between the ruling NDA and the opposition.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMitwFBVV95cUxNRFI5aXRTSTN6NzZSaklYeXJveS1jQ1BEMm5TY2dncFp1cjYxZTY5cThLWDJQWE0tTXB1NU91ZXNBZjdMRjk4UU9XX29uUlY2Ui00czk2WURLRTFHUXozUEcxX2NkcW9hTXJtQjNXZ0FqU1Z1dVQ2VllaSnZGZno4UkdjaXRGclpKR09mb3Q0NkRwSld5cTlfaXBkUnk2a084bmt3Rkxka0hFWUVWUGpQNGpWb1R1c3c?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I1</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I2</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I15</a></span></li>
</ul>

<h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li>Prime Minister Modi is set to address the paper leak crisis in a Cabinet meeting, with plans to introduce stricter anti-leak legislation in Parliament next week to strengthen governance.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W1</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W2</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W3</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiyAFBVV95cUxNVUdiZU9vWENISTFqM2pnblpSWkNEZHUtYUYwSjVTckZZbGZxMlhaTnByQlBmazd2NnJ3QklNTUhZb1FvaVQ5R0ZXQnU3WmladU53Y1BMOVoxM0RBODhXS3FmUTNwVHhQZ2x6RVB1R05hOHlJWGQ1a2d0Q0lvQlVDU1BuQ3V6NHQ4OWVmS3ktVV9PTnVpRktfNUluaHUtbE1DVy1QN1hIbWhIQU9mQ1E2cnpmTXhoWTdmYVh5cVVjV0t0Qzh0TzZhTA?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W4</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W5</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W6</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W7</a></span></li>
  <li>India defended its Quality Control Orders at the WTO, asserting that these measures are essential for achieving legitimate public policy objectives.</li>
</ul>
